title: Export boards to presentations! (tables, charts, graphs)
excerpt: Hello! I’m a solo developer working on an app called Board to Presentation, designed to export monday.com board data into presentation with tables, charts, and graphs! Whether you’re presenting data to stakeholders, shar…

posts.author: TinyFoxLabs (TinyFox Labs)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello! I’m a solo developer working on an app called Board to Presentation, designed to export monday.com board data into presentation with tables, charts, and graphs! Whether you’re presenting data to stakeholders, sharing progress updates, or preparing for meetings, this app streamlines the process to save you time and deliver impactful visuals.

App features:

  • Export board data as tables, pie/bar/line/column charts, and bubble graphs
  • Save presentation settings as templates for future use
  • App can be use as board view, board group menu and multi item menu

Demo: Watch here

posts.author: TinyFoxLabs (TinyFox Labs)
posts.cookedHtml: Board to Presentation is now live on the marketplace

posts.author: TinyFoxLabs (TinyFox Labs)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’ve started showcasing how Board to Presentation can be use in real use case scenarios with popular monday.com templates. Stay tuned for easy-to-follow examples of how to automate report creation and turn board data into professional tables, charts and graphs in PowerPoint presentations!

Check out our first video and let us know what other use cases you’d like to see.
Video for Basic CRM template

posts.author: TinyFoxLabs (TinyFox Labs)
posts.cookedHtml:
Q1 2025 Issues & Improvements

Table Slide Enhancements We’ve refined how data is displayed in table slides:
* Date columns now appear as: 2025-05-05 → 5 May, '25
* Timeline columns: 2025-05-05 - 2025-07-10 → 5 May, '25 – 10 Jul, '25
* Time Tracking columns: 15:20:16 → 15h 20m 16s
* Week columns: 2025-05-05 - 2025-05-12 → This week, Next week, `X weeks
* Fixed an issue where presentations wouldn’t generate if 0 columns were selected

Bar, Stacked Bar, Line, Column and Stacked Column Slides Enhancements Dates on the label axis are now sorted correctly.

Helpful Tips for Using the App We heard your feedback—some features weren’t as intuitive as we hoped. We’ve added in-app tips to help users get started more easily.

Auto-Save for Presentation Templates Presentation templates are now saved automatically after each generation—provided a template name is set.

Feedback Button You can now quickly share your thoughts or issues with us via the new in-app feedback button.
